summary: Iteration 15 — CRM integration (backend /api/crm/* + frontend /crm/* routes). Backend: 35/35 pytest tests PASS covering auth gating (PM-only, 401 anon, 403 non-PM), sync-from-main-app idempotency, patient CRUD with main-app bridging, dashboard stats/patients-to-call/revenue-summary, opportunities generate+list with revenue_category, laboratories CRUD, lab-test catalog CRUD, lab booking with auto revenue conversion, interactions with future-date validation, vitals writing to SHARED collections (blood_glucose/pressure/body_metrics), appointments to shared collection, lab reconciliation reports, onboarding, collection isolation (all CRM tables prefixed crm_), and main-app regression (/api/auth/me, /api/medications, /api/prescription-manager/*, /api/appointments). Frontend: dashboard renders correctly and ProtectedRoute redirects anon users — BUT the app has a HARD COMPILE ERROR that makes the webpack-dev-server overlay intercept every click in the preview: CrmPatientOnboarding.jsx imports a symbol that does not exist in crmApi.js, plus an unknown ESLint rule directive in CrmLabReconciliation.jsx.

minor.issue: Requires required query params group_by + value; returns 422 when omitted. Not a defect but undocumented — consider marking them Optional or returning a clearer contract.

ui_bugs.issue: Imports { getPatientSyncStatus } from '@/lib/crmApi' but no such export exists in /app/frontend/src/lib/crmApi.js. Webpack raises a hard compile error and the dev-server error overlay (iframe#webpack-dev-server-client-overlay) blocks ALL pointer events on /crm, /prescription-manager, and every other route — every nav link / button appears to hang/timeout.

Uses '// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps' but this rule is NOT registered in the CRA ESLint config → ESLint fails → contributes to the compile overlay. Either add react-hooks plugin or remove the directive and fix deps.

integration_issues.flow: Any CRM click (Patients nav, Sync Users, Open CRM back to /crm)
integration_issues.issue: Cannot be tested from UI because webpack overlay iframe intercepts pointer events site-wide until the compile error is resolved. Rendered DOM underneath is correct (CRM Dashboard layout, sidebar, stats cards, daily task list all present).

action_items: FIX (CRITICAL): Add a named export getPatientSyncStatus in /app/frontend/src/lib/crmApi.js OR remove its import from /app/frontend/src/pages/crm/CrmPatientOnboarding.jsx (lines 20, 115). Without this the entire preview app is frozen behind the webpack overlay.

FIX (HIGH): In /app/frontend/src/pages/crm/CrmLabReconciliation.jsx around line 170, either (a) install/enable eslint-plugin-react-hooks so react-hooks/exhaustive-deps resolves, or (b) drop the eslint-disable directive and list the missing deps in the useEffect dependency array. Currently ESLint flags it as an unknown rule and the message surfaces in the dev overlay.

AFTER FRONTEND FIX: Re-run Playwright to verify Open CRM button → /crm navigation, sidebar nav between /crm/patients /crm/opportunities /crm/lab-tests /crm/lab-reconciliation, Sync Users toast, and patient detail tabs (Overview/Medicines/Vitals/Products/Lab Tests/Doctor Booking/Interactions).
OPTIONAL: Make group_by and value query params Optional on /api/crm/reports/lab-reconciliation/details, or document the contract in the spec.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend CRM import/export drift is the root cause of the preview being unclickable — a CI check (yarn build or eslint) before merge would have caught it.
Good: CRM router uses router-level Depends(require_pm) so every endpoint is PM-gated consistently; /api/crm/ correctly returns 401 anon, 403 for regular users, 200 for PM.

Good: Collection isolation is clean — only crm_patient_profiles, crm_custom_lab_tests, crm_lab_bookings, crm_laboratories, crm_revenue_conversions exist under crm_ prefix. Vitals + appointments correctly written to the SHARED collections (blood_glucose/pressure/body_metrics/appointments).
Good: sync/from-main-app is idempotent and role-filters prescription_manager/admin out of the patient universe.
Good: DELETE /api/crm/patients/{id} preserves main-app user + medications; GET after DELETE auto re-creates the CRM profile via ensure_crm_profile_for_user (verified).
Good: Lab booking auto-records revenue conversion (category=lab_test) when price>0; MTD revenue endpoint returns total+by_category+trend.
File size: /app/backend/routes/crm.py is ~2000+ lines. Consider splitting into crm/patients.py, crm/opportunities.py, crm/labs.py, crm/dashboard.py for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 25% (rendering OK, interaction blocked by webpack overlay)

test_credentials: PM session cookie=test_pm_crm_2026 (user 2069063a-50c1-4f99-99e5-5b5d2b21d7ab, role=prescription_manager). Regular user session cookie=test_user_crm_2026 (user f2eefadb-a488-495f-b93f-09300ceb112a advsarun@gmail.com). Both inserted fresh into db.sessions with 7-day expiry.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 2 long-lived test session tokens into db.sessions (test_pm_crm_2026, test_user_crm_2026). Test run also created one TEST_ prefixed lab, one TEST_ custom lab test, one lab booking, one interaction, one appointment, vitals; all tagged TEST_ or on existing customer f2eefadb-…
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend CRM is GREEN — re-running /app/backend/tests/test_crm_api.py should pass 35/35. Frontend needs the two compile fixes above before any UI Playwright run is meaningful; the preview URL shows a full-screen red webpack overlay until those are resolved. Use injected sessions (test_pm_crm_2026 / test_user_crm_2026) — they live in db.sessions with 7-day expiry. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: https://careable-preview.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: Frontend hard compile error root cause: CrmPatientOnboarding.jsx line 20 imports { getPatientSyncStatus } but crmApi.js only exports { syncFromMainApp, syncPatient, … } — the ported repo referenced a helper that was not carried over. Webpack raises a fatal 'export not found' error, CRA's dev-server then shows the error overlay via an iframe that covers the viewport with pointer-events:auto, so every click (sidebar nav, Sync Users, Open CRM) appears hung with 'iframe webpack-dev-server-client-overlay intercepts pointer events'. Fix: add `export const getPatientSyncStatus = (id) => api.get('/patients/' + id + '/sync-status')` OR whichever URL the backend supports, OR simply drop the import + its usages (line 115, 156) in CrmPatientOnboarding.jsx. The second ESLint rule error in CrmLabReconciliation.jsx compounds the overlay. After these 2 fixes the overlay disappears and all data-testid clicks (open-crm-btn, nav-patients, crm-sync-button) will work.
